articles.title: Kathryn Bryce's all-round effort takes Scotland to tri-series win
articles.description: Scotland finished as the table-toppers after beating Netherlands, with three wins in four matches and one match between Bangladesh and Netherlands to go

articles.title: England brace for new beginnings as old failings take back seat
articles.description: New Zealand are perfect opponents to stress-test post-Ashes attitude, as they seek another away series win

articles.title: Battling Australia force series decider as questions grow for Pakistan
articles.description: Tricky pitches have forced batters to adapt and led to a major role for spin and changes of pace

articles.title: New Zealand home summer to start with blockbuster all-format India tour
articles.description: The New Zealand men's side will also host Sri Lanka for an all-format tour, while the women will host Bangladesh for three T20Is and as many ODIs

articles.title: Melbourne Stars and Renegades set to merge, second franchise to be sold in full
articles.description: The Stars' name and colours will be rebranded by CV; Renegades could play under caretaker administration in 2026-27

articles.title: Thunder confirm Flintoff as BBL coach in 'most significant off-field acquisition in club history'
articles.description: Thunder general manager Trent Copeland says Flintoff's "knowledge of Australian cricket and our Thunder program stood out during the process"

articles.title: ICC approves red-to-pink ball change to reduce bad-light impact in Test cricket
articles.description: Both teams will have to agree to changing the ball from red to pink in case of bad light during a Test match

articles.title: Quicks and Kohli lead RCB to second straight IPL title
articles.description: Virat Kohli chose this final to hit his fastest IPL fifty and his highest playoff score, leading a five-wicket win with two overs to spare

articles.title: Ruturaj Gaikwad replaces Riyan Parag for India A's tri-series in Sri Lanka
articles.description: Parag has been ruled out due to a hamstring injury that he carried through the later stages of the IPL

articles.title: McCullum refreshed and 'keen to finish job we started' with England
articles.description: Head coach wants "refinement" of Test approach after being backed by ECB following Ashes debacle

articles.title: Reports: Suryakumar Yadav stripped of T20I captaincy, to lose place in team as well
articles.description: Suryakumar Yadav has been reportedly sacked from his role as India's T20I captain.

articles.title: Mosaddek Hossain returns after four years as Bangladesh announce squad for first two ODIs vs Australia
articles.description: Batting all-rounder Mosaddek Hossain has been recalled to the Bangladesh setup after four years as chief selector Habibul Bashar named the squad for the first two ODIs versus Australia.

articles.title: 'Jofra Archer has no interest in Tests' - Simon Doull criticises England seamer for his absence in series opener vs New Zealand
articles.description: "It's ludicrous. Absolutely ludicrous. How are you paying this guy up to a £1 million per year and he's not available for your first Test match?" Simon Doull asked about Jofra Archer.

articles.title: 'Lot of positives going into the Women's T20 World Cup' - Harmanpreet Kaur remains confident despite series defeat to England
articles.description: Harmanpreet Kaur played well in the third T20I between India and England at The Cooper Associates County Ground in Taunton on Tuesday, June 2. However, the Women in Blue failed to secure the win.
